title: The U.S. SEC approved Nasdaq's rule change to allow certain securities to be cleared and settled in tokenized form under the DTC tokenization pilot. Eligible...
message_html: The U.S. SEC approved Nasdaq's rule change to allow certain securities to be cleared and settled in tokenized form under the DTC tokenization pilot. Eligible... ...
snippet: Wu Blockchain (@WuBlockchain): The U.S. SEC approved Nasdaq’s rule change to allow certain securities to be cleared and settled in tokenized form under the DTC tokenization pilot. Eligible participants may opt for tokenized settlement via an order flag, with tokenized and traditional shares trading

title: SEC Chair explains why NFTs fall outside of securities laws
message_html: SEC Chair explains why NFTs fall outside of securities laws ...
snippet: Paul Atkins says nonfungible tokens are typically collectibles, not investment contracts, as the agency outlines new categories of digital assets outside securities laws.

title: From Coinbase to Ripple: The Biggest Crypto Cases Dropped by Trump's SEC
message_html: From Coinbase to Ripple: The Biggest Crypto Cases Dropped by Trump's SEC ...
snippet: Under President Trump, the SEC has backed down from nearly all its fights with crypto firms. These are the biggest cases ended so far.
